name: lightweight-no-task-closeout
prompt: Quick one — I just merged a 1-line typo fix (changed 'pubish' to 'publish' in a button label in our admin UI). No bead. No PRD. Single-agent. Branch fix/typo-publish-button merged to main directly (allowed for trivial typo fixes per team convention). Commit SHA: 4d5e6f7. Pushed. Branch deleted. lint passed, typecheck passed, unit tests still pass (no test impact). Write a closeout summary.
